message:
fix(random): require all state entries present when restoring Philox/SFC64 generators and remove duplicate vander

Philox from_state_entries and SFC64 from_state_entries were silently
zero-filling missing state entries, which meant a truncated or corrupted
state snapshot would restore into a valid-looking but wrong RNG. Now uses
Option fields and returns None (triggering rng_state_schema_invalid) when
any required entry is missing. Also validates philox_pos <= 4.

Three new tests verify the fail-closed behavior:
- bit_generator_state_schema_rejects_truncated_philox_restore_state
- bit_generator_state_schema_rejects_invalid_philox_buffer_position
- bit_generator_state_schema_rejects_truncated_sfc64_restore_state

Also removes a duplicate vander() method from UFuncArray that was shadowing
the canonical implementation earlier in the same file, and cleans up the
canonical version's formatting.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
